case_title: CRAWFORD, LOUISE FRAZIER VS FORD, RINARD et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CRAWFORD, LOUISE FRAZIER AS TO DEFENDANT FORD, RINARD FORD, MELBA E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-23-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FORD, RINARD
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT FORD, MELBA E. HEARING SET FOR MAR-13-2008 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF TO EXTEND TIME RE PAYMENT TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR FILED BY DEFENDANT FORD, RINARD
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2007 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS, CLERK S. VANTREE, NOT REPORTED.(506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRAWFORD, LOUISE FRAZIER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FORD, RINARD FORD, MELBA E. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,080.00, DEFENDANT TO PAY $5000.00 TO PLAINTIFF ON OR BEFORE DECEMBER 31, 2007, IF NOT DEFENDANT TO DELIVER SUBJECT CAR TO PLAINTIFF AND DEBT IS HEREBY EXCUSED. IF CAR NOT DELIVERED, $5000.00 OWED TO PLAINTIFF WITH INTEREST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE RECEIVED FROM PLAINTIFF FOR DEFENDANT MELBA E. FORD. DEFENDANT RINARD FORD WAIVES SERVICE TODAY. BOTH PARTIES HAVE AGREED THAT DEFENDANT RINARD FORD WILL DELIVER SUBJECT VEHICLE TOMORROW AT 12PM. PLAINTIFF TO FILE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT TOMORROW IF VEHICLE RECEIVED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-25-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FORD, MELBA E.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-07-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-07-2007 BY JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS, CLERK S. VANTREE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
